plugin_desc: Hikvision Brainware storage-specific SNMP collection for Hikvision storage devices using the local private MIB tree (enterprise-like PEN 99999). In addition to standard IF-MIB interface metrics, it collects vendor health — device CPU and memory utilization, CPU temperature, total disk status, RAID status, power status, and CPU fan status. Raw health status value 1 is treated as healthy and every other value as fault, with the worst component taken per device by max(). Capacity and IO-rate counters are not modeled as shared health metrics. Supported brands/models — Hikvision Brainware storage systems with SNMP enabled.
name: Storage

metrics.name: device_cpu_usage
metrics.description: This metric reports Hikvision storage device CPU utilization from BnVSCPU, expressed as a direct percentage.

metrics.name: device_memory_usage
metrics.description: This metric reports Hikvision storage memory utilization from BnVSMemory, expressed as a direct percentage.

metrics.name: device_temperature_celsius
metrics.description: This metric reports Hikvision storage CPU temperature from BnVSCPUTemp, read directly in degrees Celsius.

metrics.name: device_disk_state
metrics.description: This metric reports Hikvision storage disk health from total disk status and per-disk status values, normalized so that 1 is healthy and every other value is fault.

metrics.name: device_raid_state
metrics.description: This metric reports Hikvision storage RAID health from total RAID status and per-RAID status values, normalized so that 1 is healthy and every other value is fault.

metrics.name: device_psu_state
metrics.description: This metric reports Hikvision storage power state from BnVSPowerStatus, normalized so that 1 is healthy and every other value is fault.

metrics.name: device_fan_state
metrics.description: This metric reports Hikvision storage CPU fan state from BnVSCPUFan, normalized so that 1 is healthy and every other value is fault.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average received byte rate from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counter.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average transmitted byte rate from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counter.
